description_long: This is a modern residential house complex featuring two main buildings separated by a courtyard and surrounded by a perimeter wall. The primary structure has two stories with large, rectangular windows and a flat roof, while the secondary building is single-story with a similar flat roof and minimalist design. The courtyard includes green landscaping with trees and a small pool, providing a private outdoor space. The property also features a detached garage or storage unit adjacent to the main entrance. The exterior is predominantly white and gray, with clean lines and a focus on geometric forms. The overall layout emphasizes privacy, open space, and contemporary architectural elements.
description: A modern two-building house complex with flat roofs, large windows, a courtyard with trees and a pool, and a detached garage, all enclosed by a perimeter wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing both main buildings, the courtyard with a tree, and the detached garage on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the property, the courtyard greenery, and the rear of the garage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open courtyard, large windows, and the main entry area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, trees, and the back of both buildings with visible flat roofs.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flat overhang, large glass door, and no visible steps or porch
